description: Creates a circle on a 2D graph using center-and-radius, two-point, three-point circumscribed construction, diameter endpoints, or equation string.
utility: Draw a circle from center+radius, two points, three points, diameter, or equation

arguments.name: center or P1
arguments.description: Center point or first defining point

arguments.name: P2 or radius()
arguments.description: Through-point or radius modifier when center is given

alternates.description: Circle with center at a point and given radius
Circle centered at P1 passing through P2; radius equals the distance between them
Unique circle passing through all three points
Circle with P1 and P2 as diameter endpoints; center is midpoint

examples.scenario: Circle with center point and radius with color and fill (equation of a circle lesson)
Circle from diameter endpoints (circle from a diameter lesson)
examples.expression: circle_1 = circle(graph_1, point_1, point_2, type(diameter), c(mediumvioletred),notes("the diameter defines the circle completely"))

examples.scenario: Circle from diameter using intersection points (axis intercepts lesson)
examples.expression: circle_1 = circle(graph_1, point_3, point_5, type(diameter), c(mediumvioletred),notes("A and B are the diameter endpoints"))

examples.scenario: Circle from general equation string for point position analysis
Circle with center on a line using ratio and radius with zero fill opacity
